title: Brand GTM Brief
description: A tenant ICP Brief for brand-enriched AutoGTM (specs/004). companies_filters/people_filters are exactly Explee PublicCompaniesFilters/PublicPeopleFilters.

status.description: only `approved` may derive + drive paid Explee ops

companies_filters.description: Explee PublicCompaniesFilters (~50 fields): definition, definition_exclude, geo_include, geo_exclude, size, revenue_annual, is_b2b, is_saas, is_tech, is_ai, industry_nace_classes, technologies, funding_last_round_stage, has_public_emails, criteria, …

people_filters.description: Explee PublicPeopleFilters: job_titles, job_titles_exclude, geo, followers, people_per_company_limit, criteria

fit_criteria.description: used by the re-scoring pass (Kha-Ba-La / positioning fit)
